title: Three Live Ghosts
writer: Ouida Bergère, Frederic S. Isham, Max Marcin
actors: Anna Q. Nilsson, Norman Kerry, Cyril Chadwick
plot: Spoofy, Jimmy Gubbins, and Billy Foster are all reported dead in the First World War. In reality, they have been prisoners of the Germans and are released at the end of the war. They return to England to discover that they are bel...
